scripts.dev: bun run meta/scripts/setup.ts && bun run --hot src/index.ts
scripts.docker:dev: mkdir -p volumes && sudo chown -R 1000:1000 ./volumes && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up --build && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yaml down
scripts.db:migrate: bun --bun drizzle-kit migrate && echo 'Ran by the github workflow'
scripts.db:generate: bun --bun drizzle-kit generate && echo 'Ran by precommit hook'
scripts.fmt: bun x prettier --write . '!./volumes' && bun x eslint . --fix
scripts.lint: bun x prettier --check . '!./volumes' && bun x eslint .
